resolution_summary: EXP-539-baby-batch-1.json Patch 1: change 'requires a coefficient of ~0.097' to 'requires a coefficient of ~0.18' in §7.11 absorbability-proof paragraph. At r≈10,008 km (equatorial ring), the dome's n(r) formula gives k≈0.18 to achieve n=1.40, not k≈0.097. The piecemeal-table inconsistency argument survives with the corrected number (0.18 ≠ 0.20 ≠ 0.27).
action_for_decider: apply Patch 1 of EXP-539-baby-batch-1.json to data/sections.json; close ISS-2398
